title: Tata Motors is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Tata Motors is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Quality Control Engineer with drive and ambition, Tata Motors in Chennai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Tata Motors:
Tata Motors is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Motors!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
